title: Hieracium obscurisquamum
taxonomy: Hieracium obscurisquamum is a species of hawkweed in the dandelion tribe. It belongs to the family Asteraceae and the genus Hieracium. The species is a part of the larger family of dandelion and hawkweeds, which includes many species of flowering plants. Hieracium obscurisquamum is a type of perennial plant that is native to certain regions. Its classification is further divided into the rank of species, genus, family, and order, with the order being Asterales.
